title: Refine v6.4 direction from external AOF/QIF retrospective
description: Incorporate feedback that AOF/QIF was used too much as post-implementation evidence and structural validation. Define v6.4 around pre-implementation quality gates, negative acceptance, product assumption review, corrected assumptions, and QIF-governed benchmark explanation.
triage_notes: Completed feedback intake: v6.4 direction now emphasizes pre-implementation quality gates, negative acceptance, product assumption review, corrected assumptions, and QIF-governed explanation.
